note: Stage-1 ROUND 2 (image, bGPT, usc_textures). Round-1 winner on ALL four edges (lr 3e-4 max, train_interval 4 min, epochs 3 max, lora_r 32 max; usc delta 1.16%, clic 2.30%), so round 2 EXTENDS every edge outward (lr up, epochs up, r up, train_interval down) and adds the MLP target_modules axis (c_attn vs +c_fc,c_proj). Data unchanged from round 1 for clean attribution — bigger data belongs in Stage 2, not here. (clic2024 showed a larger delta than usc here; if you want to tune on it instead, swap fixed.data.) If a knob is STILL on an edge after round 2, extend again in round 3.
